'''Azameen''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] from the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Zug]] in the [[Zug system/Legends|Zug system]]. It was an arid terrestrial world that had two [[Moon/Legends|natural satellites]] and was the last planet before the [[The Coins of Gauha|asteroid belt]] of its [[Star system/Legends|star system]].<ref name="Aargau" />

==Behind the scenes==
Azameen was first mentioned briefly in "Three Simple Laws," the first part of the ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' article series ''[[Aargau: For All Your Banking Needs]]'', which was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published on the [[Wizards.com]] website in [[2003]].<ref name="Aargau" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Zug [[Star system/Legends|system]], thereby including Azameen, in grid square L-10.<ref name="TEA" />
